headline.purpose: Month title and page header; 700 weight, tight tracking.

title.purpose: Section headers, day numbers, staff names.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled pill for the main action (save, unlock edit).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--md-primary, #0D9488); color: #fff; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; transition: all 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2DD4BF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tonal Button
components.description: Soft teal-tint pill for secondary actions (month nav, share).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-tonal">เดือนถัดไป</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-tonal { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(13,148,136,0.10); color: #0F766E; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; transition: all 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-tonal:active { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: 1px outline pill; danger variant swaps to alert red.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; border: 1px solid #C6C6C8; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #1C1C1E; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; transition: all 150ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outlined:active { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Me Chip
components.description: Solid teal pill marking the current user in lists.
components.css: .ds-chip-me { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #0D9488; color: #fff; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }

components.name: Count Chip
components.description: Neutral pill for counts and meta labels.
components.css: .ds-chip-count { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--md-surface-variant, #F2F2F7); color: var(--md-on-surface-var, #6C6C70); font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-chip-count strong { color: #0F766E; }

components.name: Card
components.description: White surface card floating on the grouped background.
components.html:
เวรวันนี้
เช้า: สมศรี · บ่าย: วิชัย
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--md-surface, #fff); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.04), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--md-on-surface, #1C1C1E); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--md-on-surface, #1C1C1E); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Surface-variant filled field with teal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--md-surface-variant, #F2F2F7); border: 1px solid var(--md-outline, #C6C6C8); border-radius: 12px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: var(--md-on-surface, #1C1C1E); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #2DD4BF; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6C6C70; }

components.name: Shift Cell
components.description: Signature calendar day tile: rounded tile, typographic shift glyph.
components.css: .ds-shift-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 56px; width: 48px; padding: 8px 0; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; transition: all 150ms; } .ds-shift-cell:hover { border-color: #2DD4BF; } .ds-shift-day { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6C6C70; } .ds-shift-code { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #DC2626; }

narrative.overview: One look answers "who's on duty" — that is the whole system. The interface behaves like an iOS system utility: neutral grouped backgrounds, white surface cards with large rounded corners, and a single Scrub Teal accent that carries every interactive and "you/now" signal. Nothing decorates; every color on screen encodes meaning. The system explicitly rejects dense Excel/HIS-style grids and heavy Material idioms; density comes from typography weight and pill chips, never more borders.
keyCharacteristics: iOS grouped-background layering: bg → surface card → tinted callout
Pill geometry everywhere: full-radius buttons, chips, badges
Scrub Teal = interaction + identity; red = weekend/holiday/danger only
Dark mode is first-class (true black bg, elevated surfaces)
Soft tactile feedback: active scale + opacity dip on every pressable

rules.name: The Meaning-Only Rule
rules.body: Chromatic color appears only when it encodes state: shift codes, today, holiday/weekend, me. Decoration stays neutral.

rules.name: The Two-Voices Rule
rules.body: Teal speaks for "you and now"; red speaks for "off-duty and holiday". No third voice joins at surface level.

rules.name: The Thai Headroom Rule
rules.body: Line-height never drops below 1.25× on Thai text; diacritics must never clip.

rules.name: The Whisper Shadow Rule
rules.body: If a shadow is noticeable, it's too dark. Elevation reads as air, not as drop shadow.

dos: Do keep every pressable with tactile feedback (active:scale + opacity, 150ms).
Do use teal tints + 1px teal border for today/me emphasis.
Do hold body text at Ink; Ink Secondary only for short labels.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion for the entrance animation set.
donts: Don't build dense Excel/HIS-style grids — no hairline-border tables, no sub-12px cell text.
Don't import heavy Material idioms: no ripples, no saturated multi-color palettes, no FABs.
Don't add a third accent color; teal and red are the only voices.
Don't use frosted glass anywhere except sticky scroll headers.
Don't use colored border-left stripes thicker than 1px as accents.
